# Distribution APK

`wechat2docx-release.apk` — signed release build of the WeChat → DOCX app.

## Install
```
adb install -r dist/wechat2docx-release.apk
```
Or transfer the APK to a device and tap to install (requires "Install from
unknown sources" enabled for the file manager / browser used to open it).

## Signature schemes
Signed with v1 (JAR) + v2 + v3. v1 is included so Chinese OEM installers
(MIUI / HarmonyOS / EMUI / ColorOS) and pre-API-24 sideload paths accept
the package — without v1 those installers reject the APK with "There was
a problem parsing the package."

## Signer
This APK is signed with the test-only keystore at `app/keystore.jks`
(`CN=WeChat2Docx Test, O=Test, C=US`). It is NOT a production credential.

## Build
The APK is regenerated by `./gradlew :app:assembleRelease` at the repo
root. The signed output also lands at
`app/build/outputs/apk/release/app-release.apk`; the copy here is for
download convenience and is kept current with each release.
